transcript.speaker: Theo
transcript.message: Morning team. It's Monday, Feb 16. Let's run through today's standup.

transcript.speaker: Elon
transcript.message: We had 217 commits across both repos this week. Hub build is healthy. Flagging: uncommitted changes: hub (4 files), monorepo (16 files). Also, 1 critical sync gaps in ecosystem-map.

transcript.speaker: Dave
transcript.message: Paper portfolio is at $100,000. Fear & Greed is at 36, rated fear. SPY is in a sideways regime. No active BUY signals. 24 assets in HOLD. Market's in wait mode. Positions active: BTC/USD, ETH/USD.

transcript.speaker: Alex
transcript.message: We have 3 podcast episodes produced. Only 1 synced to the website — we need to get the rest up on joshlevylabs.com. 1 blog post on /writing. We need to publish more written content to build SEO and credibility. Last content was published 2026-02-12.

transcript.speaker: Theo
transcript.message: Got it. Here's today's priority list: 1. Sync 2 podcast episode(s) to joshlevylabs.com. 2. Monitor market — SPY sideways, F&G at 36. 3. Draft next blog post for /writing. Let's execute. Good standup, team.

topPriorities: Monitor market — SPY sideways, F&G at 36
